query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and dark tie sits with his head resting against his right hand, his elbow propped on a surface in front of him. He wears a ring on his right hand and a metal watch on his right wrist. The background shows a dimly lit interior with out-of-focus red circular lights and blue ambient lighting near the ceiling, suggesting an evening venue such as a bar or nightclub. The man faces slightly toward the camera, and his face is partially illuminated from the left.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and dark tie sits in a heavily underexposed interior where deep shadows crush the background to black, leaving only scattered out-of-focus red circular lights and a band of blue ambient light visible. He rests his head against his right hand with a weary, bored expression—his eyes half-lidded and his mouth set in a neutral, downturned line—clearly conveying negative emotion, while darkness envelops much of the scene.
